title: clermontia kakeana
intro: Clermontia kakeana, also known as Ma'o hau hele, is a flowering plant native to the Hawaiian Islands. This plant has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Clermontia kakeana include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and protect against infection. Clermontia kakeana can be prepared for medicinal use in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and salves, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal usage.
